name: Make-Ahead Sausage Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage in a skillet and stir to crumble. Remove the sausage and set aside.
2. Beat the eggs until they are lightly colored.
3. Add bread crumbs, milk, salt, dry mustard, and the reserved sausage to the beaten eggs. Mix in the shredded cheddar cheese.
4. Pour the mixture into an ungreased 1-quart souffle dish. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
5. The next day, bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Serve immediately.
